headline: Bergvall
body: Bergvall is being linked with a transfer.
text:
🚨 EXCL: Lucas Bergvall informs Tottenham Hotspur of preference to seek new challenge elsewhere. 20yo midfielder targeted by clubs in PL + Europe & #THFC aware of wish to leave this summer for fresh start. #Sweden int’l contracted until 2031  nytimes.com/athletic/7380718…
Link
Lucas Bergvall informs Tottenham of preference to leave club this summer
Spurs rebuffed enquiries for the Sweden international in the winter window and are now aware he is seeking a fresh start.
nytimes.com
